{{CargoOrgan
|name=Qilin Arm
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10934
|idx=65
|description=This arm was once stained with the divine blood of a Qilin, making it impervious to heat and cold, and invulnerable to weapons! But at midnight, the arm becomes restless...
|skill=
|hp=1290
|def=143
|atk=209
|rush=159
|gene1=Fire DMG +60
|gene2=Fire RES +60
|gene3=Each round, {race} ATK +40
|gene4=Each round, {race} RUSH +40
|gene7=Fire DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
